thought.text: There's still a syntax error in our lexer file. Let's fix it by removing the duplicate rule:

reasoning_content:
We are getting a syntax error in the lexer grammar. Let me check the last edit: we removed a duplicate Identifier rule, but it seems there might be leftover text. The error points to line 117, which now has:
   117	        |   Digit
   118	        )*
   119	    ;

This should not be there. We must have accidentally left part of the duplicate rule. Let's remove lines 117-119.
